name: Cao Hong
page_title: Cao Hong 曹宏 [Tao Qian] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes:
Described as a man of poor quality, in the early 190s Cao Hong became a favorite of Tao Qian. The government of Xu Province deteriorated under his influence. (1)

(1): de Crespigny, Rafe: A Biographical Dictionary of the Three Kingdoms

sections.short-biography: Friend of Tao Qian, he killed many innocent people and disturbed the province.

full_text:
Cao Hong 曹宏
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Hong (曹宏)was born in Pei. Friend of Tao Qian, he killed many innocent people and disturbed the province. Cao Hong was affiliated with Tao Qian.
